candidate.completion: introduce me to your group chat so I can finally get left on read by a community.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please introduce me to your group chat so I can finally get left on read by a community.

evaluation.rationale: The line lands a clear reversal by scaling private neglect into communal neglect, and "by a community" is the sharpest part of the turn. But the route to that finish is wordy, so the wit feels more constructed than inevitable.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
